subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have heard thy clamorous cry and fervent lamentation in the love of God. Verily, He hath accepted all tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ضجیج و صریخت را در محبت الهی شنیدیم حق جمیع بلایا را قبول فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
